inventory.purpose: Hash one-time probe tokens for storage and lookup without persisting the raw token.
inventory.key_source: TOKEN_HMAC_KEYS_JSON current+legacy key ring in Cloudflare Secrets or local .dev.vars
inventory.rotation_policy: Rotate by introducing a new current key, keep legacy keys for at least the maximum token lifetime, then remove them.
inventory.agility_plan: Versioned h1.<keyId>.<digest> hashes and current+legacy readers allow phased key rotation and future algorithm migration without breaking active links.

inventory.purpose: Generate one-time probe tokens with 32 bytes of entropy.
inventory.rotation_policy: Platform CSPRNG; no application-managed key material.
inventory.agility_plan: If platform guidance changes, keep token length at or above 32 random bytes and update the generator in one place.

inventory.purpose: Generate synthetic image bytes and oversize payloads for integration coverage.
inventory.agility_plan: Keep test fixtures on the same platform RNG APIs as runtime code so compatibility issues surface during test maintenance.

migration_plan: Keep version identifiers in stored token hashes so readers can distinguish future algorithms or key formats.
Treat any new runtime cryptographic primitive as inventory drift until it is documented here and validated by npm run crypto:inventory.
Remove legacy token HMAC keys only after the longest issued token lifetime has elapsed.
